name: SIBOTE  Knee Compression Sleeve – Genouillere de compression - couleur aleatoire
Knee Brace Support Compression Sleeve Guard Running Football Blue M
features: Equipped with fish scale spring support strips on both sides, soft and elastic, stable support, reduce knee pressure and pain, and make exercise more labor-saving, let you enjoy the excitement of sports.
Three-dimensional weaving technique makes the knee pads tighter, 360 degree perfectly fit your kneecap curve, breathable and moisture-proof, and more comfortable to wear.
Innovative  silicone rings protect the entire knee, shock absorption to protect the entire knee, and fabric wicks moisture away from the skin while keeping the joints warm and healthy.

Nylon mesh behind the knee sleeve evacuates heat for cooler air intake, thicker than other knee protectors to provide extra reinforcement without sacrificing comfort, so you can wear them all day long.
Suitable for running, basketball, roller skating, outdoor and cycling, etc. Universal for men and women.
